meta.note: Minister of Power War Room production seed dataset. v3.0. Adds tariff orders, state regulators, dispatch history.

mergeAuditLog.reason: Same physical NDPHC NIPP plant (561MW, Cross River, Odukpani LGA). Canonical name per NERC Q1 2025.
Misnamed duplicate of Kaduna Mando 330kV. Kumbotso is in Kano, not Kaduna.
Was a transmission line entry mistakenly placed in substations. Belongs in transmissionLines table.
Alternate naming for OSERC. Canonical = OSERC per state law.

request13_tariffOrders.title: Multi Year Tariff Order 2024 (April Review)
request13_tariffOrders.notes: April 2024 Band A reclassification — major political event; Band A customers moved to cost-reflective tariff while B-E retained subsidy.

request13_tariffOrders.title: MYTO 2024 Q1 2025 Review
request13_tariffOrders.notes: Quarterly minor review; FX and inflation pass-through.

request13_tariffOrders.title: Lagos State Electricity Tariff Order 2024
request13_tariffOrders.notes: First state-issued tariff order under Electricity Act 2023; harmonised with NERC bands at issuance.

request13_tariffOrders.title: Edo State Electricity Tariff Order 2024
request13_tariffOrders.notes: Edo State carved BEDC's Edo operations into MBED Power subsidiary under EERC jurisdiction.

request13_tariffOrders.title: Enugu State Electricity Tariff Order 2025
request13_tariffOrders.notes: Enugu Band A tariff reduced relative to NERC; controversial political decision in Aug 2025.

request13_tariffOrders.title: Imo State Electricity Tariff Order 2025
request13_tariffOrders.notes: Imo State took jurisdiction in mid-2025.

request14_stateRegulators.notes: First state regulator to issue a service-based tariff order under Electricity Act 2023.

subDiscoCarveOut: MBED Power (carved from BEDC Edo operations)
request14_stateRegulators.notes: BEDC Edo operations carved out into MBED Power subsidiary.
